libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Configure OGNL tests to run with JVM args `--add-opens=java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED` and `--add-opens=java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED`; upstream 3.3.5 POM applies these in its JDK 17+ profile. Keep tests focused on normal OGNL parsing/get/set/member-access APIs, and guard SecurityManager-specific assertions because JDK 25 permanently disables SecurityManager behavior.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: JDK 25 changes around SecurityManager can make older tests assert obsolete behavior rather than library functionality.

Expression compilation uses Javassist; native-image runtime may not support all dynamic bytecode generation paths, so tests may need to treat those paths as JVM-only or explicitly handle native-image unsupported-feature failures.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL has no external service or extra test dependency need; its only runtime dependency is transitive Javassist, but upstream 3.3.5 documents JDK 17+ test JVM opens needed for reflective access.
